mapper.sql: A.SUSER_ID, A.DLOGIN_DT, A.DLOGOUT_DT, A.DCONN_CONF_DT , A.SUSER_HNDSET_ID, A.NHNDSET_APY_SEQ, A.SUSER_CONN_RESLT_TYPE_CD, A.SUSER_CONN_ERR_MSG_SBST , A.SAPPL_SRVR_ID, A.DCREATE_DT, A.SCREATE_ID, A.DMODIFY_DT , A.SMODIFY_ID
,B.SUSER_NM AS SUSER_NM ,C.SUSER_CONN_RESLT_TYPE_NM AS SUSER_CONN_RESLT_TYPE_NM ,D.SORG_NM AS SPOS_DEPT_ORG_NM
, MST.TB_USER_BAS B , MST.TB_USER_CONN_RESLT_TYPE_CD C , MST.TB_ORG_BAS D
AND A.SUSER_ID = B.SUSER_ID(+) AND A.SUSER_CONN_RESLT_TYPE_CD = C.SUSER_CONN_RESLT_TYPE_CD(+) AND B.SPOS_DEPT_ORG_ID = D.SKT_ORG_ID(+)
mapper.select:
SELECT
count(1) totalCount FROM MST.TB_USER_CONN_HIST A
